prompt: Transform the entire webpage design to mimic an ancient scroll aesthetic with parchment textures and calligraphy fonts.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Modify the design of the Facebook webpage content shown in image 1 to resemble an ancient scroll. All text within the webpage should be rendered in a calligraphy font style. The background and various content sections of the webpage should incorporate parchment textures, giving the entire page an aged, historical appearance.
objects: Facebook webpage content resembling an ancient scroll
Webpage content sections with parchment textures
Calligraphy font text throughout the webpage
Facebook layout structure (sidebars, feed, stories) maintained
Facebook icons stylized to an ancient theme
Profile pictures and embedded images/videos with aged appearance
